hawkish_phrases: ongoing tightening of monetary policy over the forecast period would be appropriate
a small margin of excess demand was therefore projected to emerge by late 2019 and build thereafter
The UK labour market has continued to tighten, with the unemployment rate falling to 4.0%
Regular pay growth has risen further to around 3% on a year earlier
dovish_phrases: Any future increases in Bank Rate are likely to be at a gradual pace and to a limited extent
recent developments are likely to have increased downside risks around global growth
indicators of growth have continued to soften and financial conditions have tightened further
could have a somewhat more negative impact on global growth
indications, most prominently in financial markets, of greater uncertainty
summary: The MPC voted unanimously to hold Bank Rate at 0.75%, with guidance that ongoing tightening would be appropriate to return inflation sustainably to target, though future increases would be gradual and limited.
